articles.description: Responsible land use is key to sustainable data center growth, balancing environmental care, community value, and digital infrastructure needs, writes atNorth’s Johann Thor Jonsson.

articles.title: The Carolinas May Hold a Critical Resource for AI Data Centers
articles.description: A USGS study estimates that 1.4 million metric tons of recoverable lithium oxide are present in the Carolinas, a potential boost for grid-scale battery energy storage.

articles.title: Heat waves mess with your brain. Scientists are trying to figure out why.
articles.description: It’s been hot in London this week. Really hot. A dangerous heat wave has hit Western Europe. Yesterday, the UK recorded its highest ever June temperature at 36.1 °C (about 97 °F). But as the weather app on my phone confirmed, it felt like 39 °C. articles.title: Oracle’s Wisconsin Suit Tests How States Hedge AI Data Center Risks

articles.title: ICF Warns Grid Deliverability May Limit AI-Era Power Growth
